creator: flo@kasimir.com
text:
Hi,

with the latest patch "port test" gives:

===> Extra files and directories check
@dirrmtry www/phpmyfaq/pdf
@dirrmtry www/phpmyfaq/config

What i meant i my previous email was to change @dirrm to @dirrmtry for
the directories i listed.

So in your first patch change

> +@dirrm %%WWWDIR%%/template
> +@dirrm %%WWWDIR%%/pdf
> +@dirrm %%WWWDIR%%/images
> +@dirrm %%WWWDIR%%/data
> +@dirrm %%WWWDIR%%/config

to

> +@dirrmtry %%WWWDIR%%/template
> +@dirrmtry %%WWWDIR%%/pdf
> +@dirrmtry %%WWWDIR%%/images
> +@dirrmtry %%WWWDIR%%/data
> +@dirrmtry %%WWWDIR%%/config

And everything should be good, i think.

Thanks for your efforts!
Florian
